page: Amazon Web Services r8id.4xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features 16 vCPUs across 8 physical cores using the x86_64 Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor, which operates at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of DDR5 memory running at 7 GHz, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is provided via a 950 GB NVMe SSD instance store volume, and baseline network bandwidth is rated at 8 Gbps.

In benchmark testing, the r8id.4xlarge demonstrates strong single-core capabilities, achieving top-tier status in Geekbench single-core and text processing tests. Single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression also show strong performance. Multi-threaded operations, such as stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core, fall into the average tier. For machine learning tasks, the processor's Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) support contributes to top-tier text generation speeds for small LLM models, though larger models run at average speeds.

The inclusion of 950 GB of local NVMe SSD storage alongside high-density DDR5 memory provides a resource-dense profile. This configuration offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that require high memory capacity and fast local scratch space without the overhead of external storage. The instance is suited for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, text processing, and small-scale language model inference.
description: Amazon Web Services r8id.4xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 16 vCPUs and 8 physical cores powered by a 3.9 GHz Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor. It is configured with 128.0 GB of high-speed 7 GHz DDR5 memory and 950 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage. Operating on the Nitro hypervisor, this instance delivers top-tier single-core CPU and text processing performance in benchmark evaluations, alongside strong single-threaded compression speeds. The hardware includes Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) and Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512), which facilitate efficient local data processing and small-scale model inference. The high memory-to-vCPU ratio and integrated local NVMe storage make this instance highly efficient for memory-bound applications, database hosting, and text-heavy processing workloads.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8id.4xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 16 vCPUs, 128 GB of DDR5 RAM, and a 950 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier single-core and text processing performance.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r8id.4xlarge features 16 vCPUs, 128 GB DDR5 RAM, and 950 GB NVMe SSD storage for memory-intensive database and text workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86 platform featuring high-speed DDR5 RAM, integrated NVMe instance storage, and strong single-core processing capabilities.
bullet_points: 16 vCPUs and 128.0 GB of 7 GHz DDR5 memory
950 GB of integrated local NVMe SSD instance storage
Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor with AMX and AVX-512 extensions
Top-tier single-core CPU and text processing benchmark results
Suited for database operations, text processing, and memory-bound workloads
